algorithm_provenance.limitations: Diagnostic direct optimization over a bounded two-mode CartPole PSM. It includes bounded Boolean-tree switch candidates with one-hot metadata and batch/restart local refinement, but is not the paper's two-hour, ten-thread continuous numerical optimization over the full one-hot switching grammar.
algorithm_provenance.one_hot_switch_encoding: records bounded discrete one-hot metadata for feature, relation, and depth-2 tree operator choices; does not optimize the paper's continuous one-hot relaxation

summary_note: Summary rows are grouped from cartpole_results.csv. With one seed per policy, sample standard deviations are 0. Best seed is selected by train_success, then train_reward, then lower seed.
survival_metric_note: Rows and summaries report mean survived simulator steps and seconds explicitly, rather than relying on reward as an implicit survival-time proxy.
